modules.name: cyber_infrastructure
modules.source: Cloudflare DoH + Shodan InternetDB + IANA/RIR RDAP
limitations: Provider/CDN ports are not target-owned exposure without additional asset proof.

modules.name: sanctions_screening
limitations: Screening is point-in-time and depends on available identifiers, transliteration and dataset freshness.

modules.name: finance_forensics
modules.source: DueSight Financial Bridge + Benford Analyzer + DE Register Filing Gate
limitations: Filing-derived values still need period, consolidation scope and original-source verification before final memo reliance.
This verifies that the Benford analyzer path works; it is not a target-specific finance finding and cannot support a memo conclusion.

modules.name: ownership_register
limitations: Manual control-set output is not live official KVK output and cannot be used as a memo-safe identity anchor without official KVK or attached source evidence.
Partial tree context is not a complete UBO conclusion and must be reconciled against official/control documents.

modules.name: business_profile_intel
limitations: Page existence is source-backed; role, scale and strategy claims still require page-level extraction review.
Article metadata is source-backed; strategic interpretation requires corroboration and context review.

modules.name: company_intel_deep_research
modules.source: DueSight Business Profile Intelligence Agent + source-first query policy + 10/12-gate guard
limitations: Public/contextual findings are reportable for demo and pre-DD triage.
Official finance, ownership and UBO claims require primary/provider documents with source hash.

modules.name: local_bulk_inventory
limitations: Inventory row only; exact sanctions/PEP conclusions require a target/person match row.
Inventory row only; exact entity/person screening still requires deterministic matching output.
Small cache; not enough for final UBO/shareholder closure without target-specific registry extract or graph provider output.

modules.name: regulatory_exposure
limitations: Registration context is not a no-risk conclusion; scope, license class and exact legal entity must be verified.

modules.name: reputation_adverse_media
limitations: No-hit is point-in-time and source-limited; it is not proof of reputation clearance.

modules.name: public_acquisition
limitations: Rows are review-only and bounded by robots/public catalog access.
Catalog metadata only; underlying dataset must be evaluated before any target claim.
Open knowledge graph; use for entity hints and cross-links, not official registry claims.

modules.name: premium_source_discovery
limitations: Discovery and routing layer; final report claims still require source-envelope corroboration.
Provider discovery row only; use it to route review and corroboration, not as standalone proof.

modules.name: source_health
limitations: Global source-health snapshot; not a target-specific completeness proof.

modules.name: provider_preflight
limitations: Provider readiness probe; not target-specific evidence.
GDELT hosted fallback needs recovery or paid/local coverage before production use.
OpenSanctions hosted hosted fallback needs recovery or paid/local coverage before production use.

modules.name: llm_orchestrator_synthesis
limitations: Guarded synthesis only; not an evidence source and not a production due-diligence opinion.
Uses only normalized evidence rows present in this sample replay.

modules.name: social_sentiment_intel
limitations: Professional/social sources are corroboration or discovery unless independently source-backed.
Sentiment is a guarded signal layer and not legal/finance/ownership proof.

intelligence_layers.name: OSINT
intelligence_layers.maps_to: business_profile_intel · ownership_register · regulatory_exposure · reputation_adverse_media · cyber_infrastructure · public_acquisition
intelligence_layers.note: Open-source / public-entity intelligence layer; not a separate evidence module yet.

intelligence_layers.name: reverse media
intelligence_layers.note: Signal layer only; never treated as proof without source corroboration.

intelligence_layers.name: shadow
intelligence_layers.maps_to: stealth public-web crawl with explicit opt-in
intelligence_layers.note: Disabled by default and gated by env flags.

intelligence_layers.name: dorking
intelligence_layers.note: Review-only and bounded by robots/public access.

intelligence_layers.name: Xortron
intelligence_layers.note: Repo/docs show Xortron hooks; explicit 14B tagging was not confirmed in the current stack.

limitations: Public/local authorized sources only; no auth bypass, no database export, no invasive scraping.
Demo/pre-DD preview only; no production completeness claim or legal advice.
Point-in-time source statuses can change and must be rerun before customer use.
Gold sample uses low-token replay evidence here; heavy synthesis is intentionally not part of this pass.
Gold/premium guarded local LLM synthesis completed; synthesis remains non-evidence and source-bound.
Hosted fallback readiness was not production-ready in preflight; local/alternative providers remain recorded and paid coverage is required before customer use.

results.limitation: Discovery layer only; individual claims still require source-envelope corroboration.
Review/triangulation layer unless official document hash or contract terms make output memo-safe.
Country-specific DE source; not a global UBO graph replacement.

results.capability: LEI identity and Level-2 relationship corroboration
results.limitation: LEI relationship data is corroboration, not a complete UBO register.
Passive/free subset; absence of exposure is not a security clearance attestation.
DNS resolution does not prove target-owned infrastructure.
Hosted fallback deferred; local source, recovery monitor or paid coverage required before production use.
Local readiness health only; matching still needs entity identifiers and policy thresholds.
Hosted fallback deferred; local source, recovery monitor or paid coverage required before production use.
Readiness probe only; does not confirm Xortron 14B or prompt quality.

score_policy.verdict_meaning: Evidence pack is usable, with explicit source and scope limitations.

components.name: evidence_integrity
components.label: Evidence integrity
components.rationale: Manifest, run ID, timestamp and evidence envelope are present; all required source-envelope fields are complete.
limitations: Evidence completeness is not the same as business-risk completeness.

components.name: source_readiness
components.label: Source readiness
components.rationale: Provider preflight is usable but not fully production-ready because deferred hosted fallback routes need recovery or paid/local coverage.
limitations: Deferred hosted fallback routes require recovery, backfill or paid/local coverage before production completeness claims.

components.name: compliance_media
components.label: Compliance and media
components.rationale: Sanctions screening returned no claim-safe match, while adverse media remains point-in-time and source-limited.
limitations: Zero candidates is source-limited and not proof of reputation clearance.
UBOs/directors still need final sanctions and PEP screening before sign-off.

components.name: ownership_governance
components.label: Ownership and governance
components.rationale: Ownership routes exist, but official UBO/shareholder evidence is not claim-safe in this replay.
limitations: Needs primary register extract, shareholder tree and acquisition documents before final UBO claims.

components.name: finance_integrity
components.label: Finance integrity
components.rationale: Finance route is technically verified, but no memo-safe official filing or target-specific finance output is available.
limitations: Needs official jaarrekening/XBRL or seller P&L before revenue, EBITDA or margin claims.

components.name: cyber_footprint
components.label: Cyber footprint
components.rationale: External footprint evidence exists, but provider/CDN context is not target-owned exposure without asset proof.
limitations: Not a penetration test, vulnerability assessment or security attestation.

components.name: business_context
components.label: Business context
components.rationale: Target-specific public context, award/proxy signals and local source inventory differentiate this target without promoting context rows to official proof.
limitations: Context-rich does not mean officially proven finance or ownership.
Award and public-web rows remain source-bound context unless primary artifacts are attached.
This is an evidence-readiness score, not legal advice and not an investment recommendation.
The score is only valid for the recorded run_id and timestamp.
Deferred hosted fallback routes or optional missing providers reduce score confidence and must be recovered/backfilled before production completeness claims.
Material business conclusions still require primary documents and human diligence review.

model_routes_required_for_max_run: MiniMax / GLM / Hermes optional contradiction and enrichment passes

measurable_added_information.actual_yield_formula: filled_source_backed_fields / requested_fields, plus review_only and official_upgrade counts.
